name: adb_plugin_reinstall_debug
description: adb uninstall luci.sixsixsix.powerampache2.plugin (ignore failure) then :app:installDebug in PA2_PLUGIN_GRADLE_ROOT via adb-plugin-install-debug.sh. Requires PA2_PLUGIN_GRADLE_ROOT.

skip_uninstall.description: If true, pass --skip-uninstall to the script
